ribbon.characterChatTooltip: Roleplay as a character with scene-aware knowledge

settings.aiEnabledDesc: Connect to an AI provider for AI-powered analysis and chat.
settings.aiApiTokenDesc: Optional bearer token for LM Studio authentication.
settings.aiCopilotPathDesc: Path to the GitHub Copilot CLI executable. Use 'copilot' if it is on your PATH.
settings.aiGrammarCheckEnabledDesc: Use the AI to check grammar, punctuation, and style in the editor.
settings.aiSystemPromptDesc: Custom system prompt sent to the AI. Leave empty to use the default prompt. Use {{LANGUAGE}} as a placeholder for the current UI language.
settings.knowledgeDesc: When enabled, the AI extracts what each character observed, learned, or said in every scene. 'Talk as character' uses this to roleplay with only the knowledge available up to a chosen scene. Generation runs once initially, then lazily for changed scenes.
settings.knowledgeMaxParallelDesc: Applies to every batch AI operation (story analysis, character knowledge scan, character chat). Set this to ≤ the LM Studio model's parallel-request slot count. The host serialises model-load probes so concurrent requests reuse the same loaded instance. Ignored when the Copilot provider is selected (forced to 1).

characterChat.includeImageTooltip: Attach the character's image (resolved per scene/chapter override) to the prompt. Requires a vision-capable LLM.

toast.knowledgeClearFailed: Knowledge cache could not be cleared.

synopsis.emptyScene: Scene is empty — nothing to summarize.

ai.chatPlaceholder: Ask the AI about your story...

ai.description: Pick a provider and fill in just enough to start chatting.

enabled.title: Enable AI features?
enabled.help: Master toggle. You can flip this off later in Settings → AI.

provider.title: Which provider?
provider.help: LM Studio runs a model locally. GitHub Copilot CLI is cloud-hosted and needs a copilot binary on PATH.
provider.lmstudioDesc: Free, private, runs against a model loaded in LM Studio on your machine.
provider.copilotDesc: Uses the copilot binary on PATH. Requires a Copilot subscription.

lmStudioUrl.title: LM Studio base URL
lmStudioUrl.help: Where LM Studio's local server is reachable. Default works out of the box.
lmStudioUrl.errorStatus: LM Studio responded {0} {1} at {2}/api/v1/models. Is the local server enabled?
lmStudioUrl.errorTimeout: Connection to {0} timed out. Is LM Studio running and the server enabled?

lmStudioModel.title: Model
lmStudioModel.help: Pick a model loaded in LM Studio. The list is fetched from the server you just confirmed.

lmStudioToken.title: API token (optional)
lmStudioToken.help: Most local LM Studio installs do not require a token. Leave empty to skip.

copilotPath.title: Copilot CLI path
copilotPath.help: Path or command name. "copilot" works if the binary is on PATH.

copilotModel.title: Copilot model (optional)
copilotModel.help: Empty uses the CLI's default model.

responseLanguage.title: Response language
responseLanguage.help: Empty = follow the app's UI language.
